title: Payout Odds Best New Artist 2026 Grammys: Leon Thomas, Sombr, Olivia Dean
text: The favorite is Olivia Dean at -250 odds, meaning a bettor would need to wager 25 dollars to win 10 dollars. Leon Thomas follows at +200, paying 20 dollars for every 10 dollars bet, while Sombr sits at +3000. Other contenders include Alex Warren +1400, The Marias +3000, KATSEYE +3000, Addison Rae +2500, Lola Young +5000. The Grammy criteria for Best New Artist emphasizes when an artist has their first major impact rather than prior releases. Leon Thomas gained momentum with his 2024 song that blew up on streaming and social media sites like TikTok. Sombr was an early favorite and is scheduled to perform at the ceremony, with his track topping the Billboard Pop Airplay chart in January 2026.
